name: Best Yet Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Grated Mozzarella or Jack Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice the onions.
2. Melt the margarine in a 4-quart Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add the olive oil and cook, stirring frequently with a wooden spoon until the onions are lightly warmed and browned.
3. Sprinkle the onions with flour, mixing to coat evenly. Stir until all traces of white flour disappear. Cook for one minute longer, then remove from heat.
4. Gradually add the beef broth, stirring constantly. Add water, return to moderately high heat, and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and cook uncovered for 30-40 minutes, tasting and seasoning with salt as needed.
6. Pour the soup into six individual oven-proof serving bowls. Place the bowls on a jelly roll pan and top each with a slice of toasted French bread. Sprinkle generously with Parmesan cheese and grated Mozzarella or Jack Cheese.
7. Place the bowls 6 inches from the preheated broiler or under an oven set to 425°F (220°C). Broil or bake until the cheese melts and turns a rich, light golden brown. Serve immediately.
